ddls:
CREATE TABLE "meteorological_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monitoring station where the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the data collection */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the data collection */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Period of the data collection (e.g., 1, 2, 3, 4, 5) */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of the data collection */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Actual data value collected */,
  "spin_up_r1" REAL /* Spin-up R1 value (example metric) */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor used for data collection */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of data collected */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version of the data entry */,
  "quality_flag" INTEGER /* Quality flag for the data (0 for good, 1 for questionable) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data entry */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the data was uploaded to the system */,
  "upload_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meteorological_data_upload_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("upload_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meteorological_data_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meteorological_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meteorological_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station (e.g., latitude, longitude, city, country) */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station in meters */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the station (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "last_calibration" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration performed on the sensor */,
  "calibration_interval" INTEGER /* Calibration interval in days */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., Temperature, Humidity) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "range_min" REAL /* Minimum valid value for the data type */,
  "range_max" REAL /* Maximum valid value for the data type */,
  "precision" INTEGER /* Precision of the data type (e.g., number of decimal places) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES meteorological_data ("data_id")
)
